evals.prompt: I'm on Scandit SDK v6 and need to migrate my SparkScan to v7. Here's my scanner file: ScannerViewController_v6.swift
evals.expected_output: The skill reads migration.md, applies the 6→7 renames and removes deprecated properties in ScannerViewController_v6.swift, and summarizes all changes made.

assertions.text: isTorchControlVisible is present in the output file
isTorchButtonVisible is NOT present in the output file
triggerButtonTintColor is present in the output file
captureButtonTintColor is NOT present in the output file
captureButtonBackgroundColor is NOT present in the output file
isBarcodeFindButtonVisible is present in the output file
isFastFindButtonVisible is NOT present in the output file

Removed properties (isHandModeButtonVisible, isSoundModeButtonVisible, isHapticModeButtonVisible, shouldShowScanAreaGuides, captureButtonActiveBackgroundColor, defaultHandMode, stopCapturingText, startCapturingText, resumeCapturingText, scanningCapturingText) are NOT present
A summary.md file is present describing changes

evals.prompt: We're upgrading our app from Scandit SDK 7 to 8. Here's our SparkScan view controller: ScannerViewController_v7.swift. Please apply any necessary changes.
evals.expected_output: The skill removes manual camera configuration code and summarizes the change, noting no other breaking SparkScan changes in 7→8.

assertions.text: A summary.md is present
Summary acknowledges that 7→8 has no other breaking SparkScan changes
The output Swift file is functionally equivalent to the input (no unnecessary changes made)

evals.prompt: We need to upgrade our SparkScan integration from SDK 6 all the way to v8. Here's our current code: ScannerViewController_v6.swift
evals.expected_output: The skill applies both migrations in order (6→7 then 7→8) and summarizes all changes organized by migration step.

assertions.text: isTorchControlVisible is present (6→7 rename applied)
isTorchButtonVisible is NOT present
Removed v6 properties (isHandModeButtonVisible, isSoundModeButtonVisible, isHapticModeButtonVisible, captureButtonActiveBackgroundColor) are NOT present
Summary covers both migration steps (references both 6→7 and 7→8)

evals.prompt: I want to upgrade my SparkScan to the latest Scandit SDK version. Here's my code and Package.resolved.
evals.expected_output: The skill reads Package.resolved to detect v6.28.1, determines the target is v8, applies both migrations without asking the user for their version.

assertions.text: Summary mentions the detected version (6.28.1 or v6)
isTorchButtonVisible is NOT present (6→7 rename applied)
isTorchControlVisible is present
Removed v6 properties (isHandModeButtonVisible, isSoundModeButtonVisible, isHapticModeButtonVisible, captureButtonActiveBackgroundColor) are NOT present
Did not ask the user for their version — proceeded autonomously
